description_long: This research institute building features a striking, modern architectural design with a series of stacked, horizontally ribbed white segments that curve outward, creating a dynamic and futuristic appearance. The structure is symmetrical, with two prominent wings flanking a central core, and subtle green accents visible at the top, possibly representing rooftop gardens or solar panels. The exterior is predominantly white, with a smooth, hard surface that suggests the use of concrete or composite panels. The building is surrounded by a soft, cloud-like environment, emphasizing its clean lines and innovative form. No visible windows or doors are apparent from these views, giving the building a monolithic and sculptural quality. The overall impression is of a high-tech, purpose-built facility designed for advanced research and collaboration.
description: A modern, white research institute with ribbed, curved wings and green rooftop accents, exuding a futuristic and monolithic presence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical, ribbed wings and central core with green accents on top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the curved wings and the layered, ribbed structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the symmetry and the continuation of the ribbed design across the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side, with clear visibility of the green rooftop accents.
attribute_entryway_design: The main entryway is not clearly visible in any of the provided views; no doors, steps, or accessibility features can be identified.
